name: Lazy Day or Refrigerator Pickles
recipeIngredient: 6 cups sliced cucumbers, peeled or not
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cucumbers and onions in a large bowl and mix well.
2. In a large saucepan, combine all remaining ingredients except garlic. Bring to a boil.
3. Stir to dissolve sugar.
4. Pour hot vinegar mixture over cucumber mixture and mix well.
5. Place one clove of garlic in each sterilized quart jar or half a clove in a pint jar.
6. Immediately fill jars with cucumbers and seal.
7. Refrigerate for 24 hours to meld flavors. You can also prepare this in a crock and cover well to store in the refrigerator.
8. Store, refrigerated, up to two months.
